macro.title: Third time’s the charm: Arizona’s new special  district opportunity
macro.what: Arizona House Bill 2999 creates State Affordability Infrastructure Districts formed through the Arizona Finance Authority, reducing local approval risk
macro.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
macro.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

macro.title: Better mortgage spreads are still keeping home sales positive
macro.what: Mortgage spreads improved to 2.01%, keeping rates near 6.60% as total pending sales rose to 422,120 vs 396,652 last year.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: MISMO updates mortgage insurance data guide for VantageScore 4.0 and FICO 10T
macro.what: MISMO updated its mortgage insurance data standards to support VantageScore 4.0 and FICO 10T, helping firms prepare for new credit models.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Turning insight to action for real estate pros
housing.what: HousingWire is integrating KCM into its Solutions group to help agents turn local market intelligence into client communications that drive decisions
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Reffkin takes the stand, MRED CEO says Zillow threatened litigation over listing policy dispute
housing.what: Compass and MRED leaders testified Zillow threatened litigation over listing access standards, briefs due July 9 and July 13.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: Government-backed modular housing trend arrives in Cleveland
housing.what: Cleveland tapped $2.56M in Ohio historic preservation tax credits to redevelop a 1901 building into an MMY modular housing factory.",
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Will the ROAD Act change what pencils for multifamily rentals?
housing.what: While the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act remains in Oval Office big yawn limbo, its game-changing relevance to multifamily developers, apartment builders, rental housing investors and capital providers is clear
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: Most Homeowners See Their Home as a Reflection of Who They Are; Most Renters See It as Just a Place To Live
housing.what: In recognition of National Homeownership Month in June, we surveyed American homeowners about how their homes and neighborhoods make them feel
housing.why: Rent moves feed shelter inflation and multifamily fundamentals.
housing.market: Rising rents help MF REITs; falling rents ease inflation but pressure NOI.

housing.title: Seller Choice Keeps Winning, Quietly
housing.what: CRMLS, the largest real estate listing service in the country, just gave home sellers a more flexible way to bring their home to the market before it is broadly launched across the internet
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.
